result.text:
#Avatars 1948 - A collection of 10,000 modernist generative portraits inspired by Gobardhan Ash’s groundbreaking ‘Avatar’ like works from the 1940s, created decades before the PFP #NFT craze began. 10,000 but no two artworks are exactly the same even if they appear to be!
https://t.co/v7OWZibRPx

legacy.full_text:
@ArtvisionNFT ADAEZE 

“Adaeze”which means Princess, daughter of a King, is an Igbo name in Nigerian origin and usually given to a female. The red coral beads usually worn on the neck/ waist and head to magnify the embodiment of the African woman https://t.co/jOVo0pRXhL
